layouts.marketing_pages: Use large padding (py-24 to py-32). Asymmetrical bento grids for features. Hero section must use a 2-column layout or center-aligned with massive typography and a high-quality image.
layouts.dashboard: High Density Grid. Strict grid hierarchy with dense and compact spacing. 1px borders.
layouts.business_model_canvas: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-10 gap-4. Key Partners (col-span-2 row-span-2), Key Activities (col-span-2), Key Resources (col-span-2), Value Propositions (col-span-2 row-span-2), Customer Relationships (col-span-2), Channels (col-span-2), Customer Segments (col-span-2 row-span-2), Cost Structure (col-span-5), Revenue Streams (col-span-5).
layouts.roadmap: Vertical timeline layout using a left border and relative positioning for markers.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Grid Borders: Expose the skeleton. Data-heavy sections should have 1px borders (border-slate-200) with no shadows to feel technical and precise. For sticky headers, use Glassmorphism (bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-slate-200).
visual_enhancers.spacing: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for containers. Use gap-8 to gap-12 for large grids, gap-4 to gap-6 for dense data.
visual_enhancers.borders: Subtle roundness. max 8px border-radius (rounded-lg) for a sharp, professional look.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Minimalist. Use shadow-sm for default cards, shadow-md on hover. No muddy or heavy drop shadows.

component_instructions.buttons: Modern pill-shaped or rounded-lg with interaction animations. Primary CTA must use the primary brand color with text-white.
component_instructions.cards: For marketing: Cardless or high-contrast border styles. For dashboard: Standard Shadcn UI Cards with custom padding (p-6) and subtle borders.
component_instructions.inputs: Shadcn UI Input, Select, Textarea. Clean, rounded-md, with ring-offset-background and focus-visible:ring-2.

motion.hover_states: All interactive elements must explicitly set text color on hover. Use -translate-y-1 and shadow-lg for dashboard cards on hover.
motion.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease (DO NOT use transition-all).
motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for list items and dashboard sections.

images.description: Startup founder pitching strategy on stage. Use in the Hero Section to establish authority.
Person using a MacBook, typing. Use in the 'How It Works' section to show ease of generating.
Close up of paper and pen representing strategy. Use in the Features section for the 'Blueprint'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for text. Buttons must have explicit hover text colors.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use default Inter for headings. Use Outfit.
No generic centered layouts for content—left-align dense content.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy and glassmorphism.
DO NOT apply universal transition (transition: all).
DO NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
DO NOT use complete transparent backgrounds in headers or overlays.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Use Tailwind scale (p-8, p-12, etc.).
Images MUST NOT exceed 80vh on mobile devices.
Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
instructions_to_main_agent: Vidur AI requires a 'Founder / Pitch-Deck' aesthetic. Keep the background clean white and rely on typography, layout density, and 1px borders to organize information. The Results Dashboard must present the generated content in a highly structured, card-based format resembling a professional consulting report. Use a responsive grid (Bento Grid style) for the 9 Output Sections (Problem, Objectives, Business Model Canvas, SWOT, Risk, Requirements, User Stories, Backlog, Roadmap). Specifically, map the Business Model Canvas into a 10-column grid that reflects the standard canvas layout. Include a 'Download PDF' button prominently.
